name: Lien registration notice
subject: Lien on assets - case #caseRef#
body: Dear #taxpayerName#, a lien for #amountAtStake# (#taxType#) has been registered against your assets on case #caseRef#. The charge is released on settlement.

name: Third-party claim order
subject: Third-party claim - case #caseRef#
body: To the third party: you are directed to pay to MTCA amounts owed to #taxpayerName# (TIN #tin#) up to #amountAtStake# in settlement of case #caseRef#.

name: Departure prohibition order
subject: Departure prohibition - case #caseRef#
body: Dear #taxpayerName#, a departure prohibition order has been requested for the outstanding debt of #amountAtStake# on case #caseRef#. It is lifted on settlement or court order.

name: Bankruptcy demand
subject: Bankruptcy demand - case #caseRef#
body: Dear #taxpayerName#, MTCA will petition for bankruptcy/insolvency proceedings for the unsatisfied debt of #amountAtStake# on case #caseRef# unless settled.

name: Warrant of recovery
subject: Warrant of recovery - case #caseRef#
body: Warrant of recovery: the appointed agent is authorised to recover #amountAtStake# from #taxpayerName# (TIN #tin#) on case #caseRef# per the terms of appointment.

name: Judicial recovery letter
subject: Judicial recovery - case #caseRef#
body: Dear #taxpayerName#, court action for the recovery of #amountAtStake# (#taxType#) on case #caseRef# will be commenced unless the debt is settled.

name: Payment arrangement notice
subject: Payment arrangement - case #caseRef#
body: Dear #taxpayerName#, the payment arrangement for #amountAtStake# on case #caseRef# is confirmed. Keep to the schedule to avoid enforcement.

name: Payment reminder
subject: Payment reminder - case #caseRef#
body: Dear #taxpayerName#, our records show an overdue balance of #amountAtStake# (#taxType#) on case #caseRef#. Please pay within the period stated.

name: Demand notice
subject: Demand for payment - case #caseRef#
body: Dear #taxpayerName#, this is a formal demand for #amountAtStake# (#taxType#) on case #caseRef#. Non-payment may lead to enforcement.

name: Final demand
subject: Final demand - case #caseRef#
body: Dear #taxpayerName#, FINAL demand for #amountAtStake# (#taxType#) on case #caseRef#. Enforcement will follow without further notice.

name: Garnishing notice
subject: Bank garnishing - case #caseRef#
body: Notice of bank garnishing for #amountAtStake# (#taxType#) on case #caseRef# against #taxpayerName#.

name: Seizure notice
subject: Property seizure - case #caseRef#
body: Notice of property seizure for #amountAtStake# on case #caseRef# against #taxpayerName#.
